message:
style(fcp-streaming): rustfmt buffer_overflow_policy chained call

Reformats the chained `stream.next().await.expect(...)` call in
stream_with_tiny_buffer_emits_buffer_overflow_error_when_chunk_exceeds_*
into the multi-line method-chain form that rustfmt applies elsewhere in
the file. Pure whitespace change — no logic, no test behavior, no
assertion edits. Brings the file into compliance with rustfmt so the
formatter no longer flags it on every check run.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
